## Overview

> ADAS system for real-time lane departure warning and road safety.

**AI Lane Monitering System** is an advanced general system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR;
    A["Input"] --> B["Core Engine"];
    B --> C{"Algorithm"};
    C --> D["Output"];

    style A fill:#001a05,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#00260a,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
AI-Lane-Monitering-System/
  LICENSE
  README.md
```
